channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Inside a taxpayer-funded treatment center for adoptees, tales of abuse, neglect and little oversight
item.description: A residential treatment center in Missouri advertises to adoptive parents that it can help heal struggling children.

item.title: Despite scrutiny, special education money flows to for-profit residential treatment centers
Crews recover the remains of 6 of the 9 workers missing after Washington chemical tank rupture
